raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a mutable object supporting the %= operator",
    "b must be a valid operand for the %= operator with a"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "a is modified in-place to be the remainder of a divided by b",
    "the result of a %= b is returned"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "b is zero",
    "a is zero",
    "a and b are very large numbers",
    "a is a complex number",
    "a is a non-integer"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a number",
    "b must be a number",
    "b must not be zero"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "a is unchanged if b is zero",
    "a is the remainder of a divided by b",
    "a is the result of a %= b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if b is zero, a remains unchanged",
    "if a is zero, a is zero",
    "if b is negative, a is the remainder of a divided by the absolute value of b"
  ]
}
